theme_strategy.visual_style: Dashboard/Admin Panel with high data density but breathable spacing

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 text-black hover:bg-orange-600 font-semibold shadow-none rounded-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 border border-zinc-700 rounded-sm

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800/50 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500 rounded-sm placeholder:text-zinc-600

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure 'Barlow Condensed' is imported in index.css.
2. THEME: Force DARK MODE by default. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked. The brand is 'Night Mode' only.
3. LAYOUT: Use a fixed sidebar layout for the admin panel. The sidebar should be collapsible.

4. KITCHEN DISPLAY: This is a key view. Use a Kanban-style board (Pending -> Preparing -> Ready) with large, readable cards. Use color coding (Orange for Pending, Blue for Preparing, Green for Ready).
5. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but style them with the 'inputs.default' styles defined above (sharp corners, dark bg).
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style the tooltips to be dark with orange borders.
7. NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for toasts. Position them top-right.
8. AI FEATURES: For the 'AI Insights' page, use a 'Terminal/Code' aesthetic. Monospace fonts for data, dark backgrounds, neon orange highlights.
9. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure the Orange text on Black background meets contrast ratios. Use lighter shades of orange for text if needed.
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients for backgrounds; use solid dark colors or subtle noise textures.
Use 1px borders to define hierarchy instead of shadows.
All interactive elements must have a hover state (brightness-110 or border color change).
Data density should be high but legible. Use 'text-sm' as the default body size for tables.
Do not use rounded-full for buttons; use rounded-sm or rounded-md for a more industrial look.
